instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: M4: Accept a pending authority transfer (called by the new authority
after the timelock has elapsed).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must be governance_config.pending_authority.

instructions.name: approve_tier_downgrade
docs: Admin confirms or rejects a staged tier downgrade.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be TierConfig.admin.

instructions.name: call_trade
docs: Master trader calls a trade through their Master Execution Vault.
This is the ONLY way to execute trades that copiers will mirror.

accounts.name: master
docs: The master trader (must sign to authorize trade)

accounts.name: config
docs: 1. THE GLOBAL CONFIG (Singleton)
We use b"config" to find the ONE global settings file.

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: We use the master's key to find THEIR specific vault.
The Master Execution Vault that will execute the trade

accounts.name: master_trade
docs: MasterTrade storage for Slot-based execution.
Initialized only when active_copier_count > atomic_threshold.

accounts.name: platform_fee_wallet
docs: Platform fee wallet (where platform fees go)

accounts.name: tier_config
docs: Singleton tier configuration. Used to resolve master's revenue split.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for fee transfers

accounts.name: jupiter_program
docs: Jupiter program for actual trading (CPI)

instructions.name: cancel_authority_transfer
docs: M4: Cancel a pending authority transfer (called by the current authority).

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must be the current primary_authority (Not the pending authority)

instructions.name: claim_fees
docs: Claim/withdraw SOL from master vault.

instructions.name: close_copier_vault
docs: Close copier vault and decrement master's active_copier_count.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: Copier vault to close. Rent is sent to copier. Must have balance 0 and position closed.

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: Master vault to decrement active_copier_count (must match copier_vault.master_vault)

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit funds into copier vault.

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns the vault (must sign)

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Week 7: Min deposit enforced for first deposit

accounts.name: vault
docs: The vault account to deposit into

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for SOL transfers

instructions.name: deposit_master
docs: Deposit capital into master vault.

instructions.name: emergency_override
docs: Week 7: Emergency override (admin-only) - toggle emergency_risk_override flag.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin (must match RiskConfig.admin).

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Protocol risk config to update.

instructions.name: emergency_pause_protocol
docs: M4: Toggle the protocol-wide emergency pause (emergency_admin only).
Blocks all new vault operations; withdrawals and risk management remain open.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Only emergency_admin can call this - NOT primary_authority.

instructions.name: emergency_withdraw
docs: Admin-only emergency withdrawal.
Requires RiskConfig.emergency_risk_override == true.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin (must match RiskConfig.admin)

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns the vault — receives their balance back.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault to drain.

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Protocol risk config — must have emergency_risk_override == true

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initialize program config.

instructions.name: initialize_copier_vault
docs: Initialize copier vault linked to a Master Execution Vault.

accounts.name: copier
docs: Copier wallet - pays rent and owns the vault.

accounts.name: vault
docs: The copier vault PDA being initialized
Derived from: ["vault", master_vault]

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: The master execution vault this copier is following.

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Week 7: Protocol-level risk caps (must be initialized before copier vaults)

instructions.name: initialize_governance_config
docs: M4: Initialize the root GovernanceConfig PDA.
MUST be called first on any fresh Zephyr deployment.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Deployer / founder wallet - becomes primary authority.

instructions.name: initialize_master_vault
docs: Initialize a Master Execution Vault for a master trader.
This is the ONLY way masters can execute copy-triggering trades.

accounts.name: master
docs: The master trader creating their execution vault

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: The Master Execution Vault PDA to create
Derived from: ["master_vault", master.key()]

instructions.name: initialize_risk_config
docs: Week 7: Initialize RiskConfig PDA (protocol-level risk caps).

instructions.name: initialize_tier_config
docs: Initialize the protocol-wide TierConfig PDA.

instructions.name: mirror_trade
docs: Mirror a master vault trade — called by the indexer service.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault that will mirror the trade

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: The master vault being copied (read-only for validation)

accounts.name: master_trade
docs: Slot-Level Deterministic Execution: The recorded master trade execution.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority that can trigger mirror trades (indexer service)
todo: In production, we'll use a PDA or multisig for better security

instructions.name: pause_copying
docs: Pause copy-execution for a vault (copier-owned).

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns this vault.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault to pause or resume.

instructions.name: resume_copying
docs: Resume copy-execution after a manual or auto pause (copier-owned).

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns this vault.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault to pause or resume.

instructions.name: set_verified_flags
docs: Admin attests to off-chain criteria (KYC, risk-adjusted returns, etc).

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be TierConfig.admin.

accounts.name: master_vault
docs: The MasterExecutionVault whose flags are being updated.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: M4: Initiate a timelocked authority transfer.
The new authority must call accept_authority after the timelock expires.

instructions.name: trigger_profit_take
docs: Week 6: Trigger automated profit-taking for a master vault position.

accounts.name: master_trade
docs: Week 7: MasterTrade storage for Slot-based execution.

accounts.name: config
docs: ← ADD THIS: Read fee configuration

instructions.name: trigger_stop_loss
docs: Permissionless stop-loss trigger.

accounts.name: executor
docs: Account paying transaction fees (backend executor / keeper / copier).
Permissionless — program enforces rules via account constraints.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault whose position we are stop-lossing out of.

accounts.name: master_trade
docs: Week 7: MasterTrade storage for Slot-based execution.

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Protocol risk config — read to verify emergency override status.

instructions.name: update_fee_wallet
docs: Update the fee wallet address.
Enables migration: simple wallet -> multisig -> DAO.

accounts.name: authority
docs: The current authority

accounts.name: config
docs: The Config to update

accounts.name: new_fee_wallet
docs: We don't validate this account because it could be a multisig or program

instructions.name: update_governance_config
docs: M4: Update non-authority fields in GovernanceConfig (primary_authority only).

instructions.name: update_risk_config
docs: Week 7: Update RiskConfig (authority-only).

instructions.name: update_risk_params
docs: Week 7: Update vault-level risk parameters (copier-only).

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns the vault.

accounts.name: copier_vault
docs: The copier vault to update.

accounts.name: risk_config
docs: Protocol risk config — new params must not exceed these caps.

instructions.name: update_tier_config
docs: Update TierConfig thresholds or revenue splits (authority-only).

instructions.name: withdraw
docs: Withdraw SOL from copier vault.

accounts.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns the vault (must sign)

accounts.name: vault
docs: The vault account to withdraw from

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program (required for account validation)

instructions.name: withdraw_master
docs: Withdraw capital from master vault.

errors.name: MasterVaultPaused
errors.msg: Master vault is currently paused

errors.name: MasterVaultNotPaused
errors.msg: Master Vault is not paused

errors.name: MasterVaultNotFound
errors.msg: Master Execution Vault not found

errors.name: UnauthorizedMaster
errors.msg: Unauthorized - you are not the master of this vault

errors.name: InvalidFeeConfig
errors.msg: Invalid fee configuration - exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: MasterFeeExceedsConfig
errors.msg: Master vault fees exceed maximum allowed in global config

errors.name: CopierVaultPaused
errors.msg: Copier Vault is currently paused

errors.name: CopierVaultNotPaused
errors.msg: Copier Vault is not paused

errors.name: UnauthorizedAccess
errors.msg: Unauthorized access - you do not own this vault

errors.name: VaultAlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Vault is already in the requested state (Paused)

errors.name: VaultNotPaused
errors.msg: Vault is already in the requested state (Active)

errors.name: TradeSizeExceeded
errors.msg: Trade size exceeds maximum allowed percentage

errors.name: InvalidRiskParams
errors.msg: Invalid risk parameters provided

errors.name: InvalidTakeProfitParameters
errors.msg: Invalid take profit parameters

errors.name: MaxLossExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum loss limit exceeded relative to total deposits

errors.name: MaxDrawdownExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum drawdown exceeded relative to peak balance

errors.name: InvalidAllocationPercentage
errors.msg: Invalid allocation percentage. Must be between 1 and 100

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for this operation

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow occurred

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount - must be greater than 0

errors.name: InvalidTradeAmount
errors.msg: Invalid trade amount

errors.name: InvalidTokenPair
errors.msg: Invalid token pair - source and destination tokens cannot be the same

errors.name: TradeFromWalletNotAllowed
errors.msg: Direct wallet trades not allowed - must use Master Execution Vault

errors.name: ProfitThresholdNotMet
errors.msg: Profit threshold not yet met - current price is below take-profit trigger

errors.name: PositionNotOpen
errors.msg: No open position to take profit on

errors.name: SellQuantityZero
errors.msg: Sell quantity is zero - position size too small for partial sell

errors.name: InvalidOraclePrice
errors.msg: Invalid oracle price provided

errors.name: OracleDisagreement
errors.msg: Oracle prices diverge beyond maximum allowed threshold

errors.name: AtomicCopierCountMismatch
errors.msg: Atomic path requires exactly active_copier_count copier vault accounts

errors.name: CopierVaultMasterMismatch
errors.msg: Copier vault does not belong to this master vault

errors.name: SlotGraceWindowExceeded
errors.msg: Slot grace window exceeded - copier execution too late

errors.name: VaultMustBeEmptyToClose
errors.msg: Vault must have zero balance and closed position before close

errors.name: RiskParamExceedsCap
errors.msg: Requested risk parameter exceeds the protocol-level cap.

errors.name: DepositBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Deposit below minimum required by RiskConfig

errors.name: StopLossConditionNotMet
errors.msg: Stop-loss conditions are not yet met - no risk limit has been breached

errors.name: DailyLossLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Daily loss limit exceeded - vault has lost more than the configured daily maximum

errors.name: EmergencyWithdrawZeroBalance
errors.msg: No balance available for emergency withdrawal

errors.name: InvalidDailyLossBps
errors.msg: Invalid daily loss limit basis points - must be between 1 and 10000

errors.name: GlobalPause
errors.msg: Protocol is globally paused — no new operations allowed.

errors.name: NoPendingDowngrade
errors.msg: No pending tier downgrade to approve or reject

errors.name: UnauthorizedEmergencyAdmin
errors.msg: Only the emergency admin can toggle the protocol emergency pause

errors.name: TimelockNotExpired
errors.msg: Authority transfer timelock has not yet expired — wait before accepting

errors.name: NoPendingAuthorityTransfer
errors.msg: No pending authority transfer exists to accept or cancel

errors.name: ProtocolEmergencyPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is under emergency pause — new operations are blocked

errors.name: InvalidGovernanceParams
errors.msg: Invalid governance parameter provided

fields.name: effective_after
docs: Unix timestamp after which accept_authority must be called

fields.name: platform_fee_bps
docs: Platform's share of fees in basis points (e.g., 2000 = 20%)

fields.name: trader_fee_bps
docs: Master trader's share of fees in basis points (e.g., 8000 = 80%)
Note: platform_fees_bps + trader_fee_bps should = 10000 (100%)

fields.name: max_success_fee_bps
docs: Maximum success fee a master can charge (basis points)
E.g., 5000 = 50% max success fee

fields.name: max_volume_fee_bps
docs: Maximum volume fee a master can charge (basis points)
E.g., 100 = 1% max volume fee

fields.name: fee_wallet
docs: Wallet address where platform fees are collected
Can be updated to migrate from simple wallet -> multisig -> DAO treasury

fields.name: authority
docs: Authrity: who can update this config
Should be founder initially, then multisg, then DAO

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin public key, who can update the config

fields.name: atomic_threshold
docs: Max copiers for atomic execution path (e.g. 20–30); above this use slot path

fields.name: slot_grace_window
docs: Max slots allowed for copier execution after master (slot path)

fields.name: protocol_version
docs: Protocol version for upgrades

types.name: CopierVault
docs: Represents a copier's vault.
CRITICAL: Links to Master Execution vault PDA. not master wallet

fields.name: copier
docs: The copier who owns this vault

fields.name: master_vault
docs: CRITICAL: Master execution Vault PDA (Not master wallet)
This ensures copiers only mirror vault-executed trades

fields.name: balance
docs: Current balance (in lamports for SOL, or token amount)

fields.name: total_deposited
docs: Total amount deposited (for PnL calculation)

fields.name: risk_params
docs: Risk management parameters

fields.name: stats
docs: Perfromance tracking

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Vault status

fields.name: created_at
docs: Time Created

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

fields.name: last_synced_position_id
docs: Last synced master position ID

fields.name: current_position
docs: Current active position

fields.name: take_profit_trigger_bps
docs: Profit-taking parameters (can override master's to be stricter)

fields.name: copy_active
docs: Re-entry configuration

fields.name: total_realized_profit
docs: Performance tracking

fields.name: daily_loss_lamports
docs: Accumulated loss in the current 24-hour window (in lamports).
Reset to 0 when the current unis timestamp exceeds
`daily_loss_reset_timestamp + 86400`.

fields.name: daily_loss_reset_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp marking the start of the current loss window.
Initialised to `created_at`; advanced by 86400 seconds each day

fields.name: daily_loss_limit_bps
docs: Maximum daily loss as basis points of `total_deposited`
(e.g. 500 = 5 %). 0 = feature disabled.
Set by the copier; validated against `RiskConfig` caps on creation.

fields.name: stop_loss_trigger_bps
docs: Custom stop-loss threshold as basis point of `total_deposited`
(e.g 1500 = 15 %). 0 = feature disabled
When the vault's cumulative loss exceeds this the stop-loss
instruction will pause the vault automatically

fields.name: stop_loss_sell_bps
docs: Percentage of position to sell when stop-loss trigger fires (basis points).
e.g. 10000 = 100% (full exit).

fields.name: stop_loss_triggered
docs: Guard flag: set to true after stop-loss fires, reset on new position.
Mirrors profit_taken pattern so both triggers are mutually exclusive.

fields.name: daily_loss_start_balance
docs: Vault balance captured at the start of the current trading day.
Reset each time `last_day_reset` is more than 86 400 seconds old.

fields.name: last_day_reset
docs: Unix timestamp of the last daily-reset check.

fields.name: amount_withdrawn
docs: Amount of lamports returned to copier

fields.name: had_open_position
docs: Whether an open position existed at time of withdrawal

types.name: FeeCollectedEvent
docs: Event emitted when fees are collected

types.name: FeeWalletUpdated
docs: Event emitted when fee wallet is updated
Important for tracking governance transitions

types.name: GovernanceConfig
docs: Protocol-wide governance configuration
PDA seed: b"governance_config" (singleton)

fields.name: primary_authority
docs: Primary authority - can update all Config PDAs and this config.

fields.name: emergency_admin
docs: Emergency admin - restricted role; may ONLY toggle emergency_pause_enabled
Should be a hardware-wallet key seperate from primary_authority

fields.name: emergency_pause_enabled
docs: When true every new vault operation (trade, deposit, vault init) is
blocked protocol-wide.
Distinct from `RiskConfig.global_pause` which only blocks copy-trade
opens — this blocks everything including deposits and new vaults.
Withdrawals, stop-loss triggers, and profit-take triggers are NOT
blocked so that users can always exit their positions.

fields.name: timelock_seconds
docs: minimum delay (seconds) that must elapse between `transfer_authority`
being called and `accept_authority` being accepted by the new owner.
example values:
0 - no timelock (devnet / test only)
172_800 - 48 hours (recommended minimum for mainnet)
604_800 - 7 days (DAO governance)

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: The proposed new primary_authority
`PubKey::default()` means no transfer is currently pending.
Set by `transfer_authority`; cleared by `accept_authority` or
`cancel_authority_transfer`.

fields.name: authority_change_after
docs: Unix timestamp after which `accept_authority` becomes callable.
Zero when no transfer is pending

fields.name: upgrade_authority
docs: Stored for transparency - the actual enforcement is by Solana's BPF
loader (not this program). Should always match the upgrade authority
returned by `solana program show <PROGRAM_ID>`.

fields.name: min_proposal_threshold
docs: Minimum token-weighted votes required to pass a governance proposal.
Zero = DAO governance not yet active; authority model is used instead.

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last update (any field).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: JupiterSwapEvent
docs: Event emitted when a Jupiter swap is triggered via CPI (Week 10)

fields.name: master_wallet
docs: The master trader who owns this vault

fields.name: total_deposits
docs: Total deposits

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Vault status

fields.name: created_at
docs: Time created

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: position_counter
docs: position counter. (increments on each. new postion)

fields.name: current_position
docs: Current active position (simplied for MVP - single asset)
for multi-asset in the future, this becomes seperate PositionAccount PDAs

fields.name: take_profit_trigger_bps
docs: progit taking parameters

fields.name: high_water_mark
docs: High-water mark for fee calculation

fields.name: active_copier_count
docs: Number of active copier vaults (for execution path: atomic vs slot)
Incremented on initialize_copier_vault; decremented when copier vault is closed

fields.name: verified_flags
docs: Bitmask of off-chain criteria verified by the admin.
Use the constants in `verified_flags` module to read/write.
Only the TierConfig admin can modify via `set_verified_flags`.

fields.name: current_tier
docs: Master's currently active tier (0 = Unranked, 1–5).
Updated immediately on upgrade; only updated after admin approval on downgrade.

fields.name: pending_downgrade_tier
docs: When a downgrade is detected, the new lower tier is staged here.
Zero = no downgrade pending.
The current tier (and its fee split) remains active until admin
calls approve_tier_downgrade.

fields.name: tier_confirmed_slot
docs: Slot at which current_tier was last confirmed (upgrade or approved downgrade).
Used by the leaderboard to display how long a master has held their tier.

types.name: MirrorTradeParams
docs: Parameters for mirroring a trade

types.name: PositionData
docs: Position data for tracking individual asset positions
This will be embedded in MasterExecution Vault and CopierVault

fields.name: position_id
docs: Unique position ID (increments on full exit -> re-entry)

fields.name: state
docs: Current state

fields.name: entry_price
docs: Entry price (weighted average for partial re-enteries)
Stored in basis point (e.g., $100.00 = 10000)

fields.name: size
docs: Current position size (in basis units)

fields.name: realized_profit
docs: Realized profit from this position (accumulated)

fields.name: profit_taken
docs: Has profut-taken been triggered for this position?

fields.name: opened_at
docs: Timestamp when position was opened

fields.name: last_updated
docs: Timestamp of last update

types.name: PositionState
docs: Position state machine for tracking position lifecycle

types.name: PositionStateChangedEvent
docs: Event emitted when position state changes

fields.name: enabled
docs: true = paused, false = resumed

types.name: RiskConfig
docs: Protocol-wide risk configuration.
PDA seed: b"risk_config"

fields.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin — only this key may update RiskConfig or trigger emergency ops.

fields.name: max_drawdown_cap_pct
docs: Global max drawdown cap (e.g., 80 = 80%). User cannot set higher.

fields.name: max_trade_size_cap_pct
docs: Maximum allowed single-trade allocation as % of vault balance.
e.g. 20 = copiers cannot set max_trade_size_pct above 20%.
Global max trade size cap (e.g., 30 = 30%). User cannot set higher.

fields.name: max_daily_loss_bps_cap
docs: Absolute maximum daily loss % cap across all vaults (basis points).
e.g. 2000 = no vault may sustain more than 20% loss in one day.

fields.name: max_stop_loss_bps_cap
docs: Maximum stop-loss trigger threshold (basis points).
e.g. 3000 = stop-loss triggers cannot be set looser than 30%.

fields.name: min_stop_loss_pct
docs: Minimum required stop-loss (e.g., 5 = 5%). User cannot set lower.

fields.name: min_vault_deposit_lamports
docs: Minimum deposit (e.g., 0.1 SOL = 100_000_000 lamports)

fields.name: emergency_risk_override
docs: When true, admin may call emergency_withdraw on any copier vault.
When true, admin can pause risky trades via emergency_override

fields.name: global_pause
docs: When true, all new copy-trade opens are blocked protocol-wide.

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last update.

fields.name: authority
docs: Who can update risk caps (update_risk_config)

types.name: RiskParams
docs: Risk management parameters (set by copier)

fields.name: max_loss_pct
docs: Maximum loss as percentage (e.g., 20 = 20%)

fields.name: max_trade_size_pct
docs: Maximum trade size as percentage (e.g., 10 = 10%)

fields.name: max_drawdown_pct
docs: Maximum drawdown percentage

types.name: StopLossSettledEvent
docs: Emitted after the backend confirms the Jupiter swap settled.

types.name: StopLossTriggeredEvent
docs: Emitted when a copier vault's stop-loss is triggered.
Backend listens for this to execute the Jupiter swap.

fields.name: oracle_price
docs: Oracle price that crossed the stop-loss threshold (micro-USD)

fields.name: entry_price
docs: Entry price of the position (micro-USD)

fields.name: loss_bps
docs: How far below entry the price has fallen (bps)

fields.name: sell_quantity
docs: Quantity to sell (in position size units)

fields.name: remaining_size
docs: Remaining position size after the sell

fields.name: unrealized_loss
docs: Unrealized loss for the sold portion (negative, micro-USD)

types.name: TierConfig
docs: Protocol-wide tier configuration.
PDA seed: b"tier_config"

fields.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin — only this key may call update_tier_config or
set_verified_flags / approve_tier_downgrade.

fields.name: authority
docs: Who can update tier thresholds (update_tier_config).

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last update.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: TierDowngradeStagedEvent
docs: Emitted when a tier downgrade is detected and staged for admin approval.
The master's current (higher) split remains active until approve_tier_downgrade is called.

types.name: TierUpgradedEvent
docs: Emitted when a master's tier upgrades immediately during a trade.

types.name: TradeExecutedEvent
docs: Emitted when a trade is executed on a master vault

fields.name: position_id
docs: Position ID (for copiers to track which position to mirror)

fields.name: trade_type
docs: Trade type classification

fields.name: price
docs: Execution price (oracle price at trade time)

fields.name: position_state
docs: New position state after trade

fields.name: position_size
docs: Current position size after trade

fields.name: realized_profit
docs: Realized profit from this trade (0 for buys)

types.name: TradeMirroredEvent
docs: Event emittef when a copier mirrors a master trade

types.name: TradeParams
docs: Trade parameters

fields.name: days_active
docs: Days since this master vault was created (clock.unix_timestamp - created_at) / 86400.

fields.name: win_rate_bps
docs: Win rate in bps (profitable closed trades / total closed trades × 10000).

fields.name: max_drawdown_bps
docs: Max drawdown in bps since vault inception (off-chain computed from snapshot history).

fields.name: rolling_aum_usd
docs: Rolling average AUM in USD (×1e6) over the relevant window.

fields.name: copier_retention_bps
docs: Copier retention rate in bps (backend-computed).

types.name: TradeType
docs: Trade type classification for events

fields.name: master_vault
docs: Master vault address (Some if master, None if copier)

fields.name: copier_vault
docs: Copier vault address (Some if copier, None if master)

fields.name: master_wallet
docs: Master wallet address (for master vaults)

fields.name: copier_wallet
docs: Copier wallet address (for copier vaults)

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Timestamp pf creation

types.name: VaultStats
docs: Vault performance statistics

fields.name: peak_balance
docs: Highest balance reached (for high-water mark)

fields.name: total_trades
docs: Total number of trades executed

fields.name: winning_trades
docs: number of winning trades

fields.name: fees_owed
docs: accumulated fees owed to master

fields.name: copy_count
docs: copy count

fields.name: allocation_percentage
docs: Allocation percentage
